reviews.comment:
Excelente YPF del ACA. El lugar es muy lindo, la atención muy buena, y quiero destacar la excelente limpieza de los baños. Seguiremos visitandola!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent YPF station at the ACA. The place is very nice, the service is very good, and I want to highlight the excellent cleanliness of the restrooms. We will continue visiting!

reviews.comment:
Siempre limpio, muy rico café con leche y sandwiches. Los calientes de pan árabe muy recomendables. Las medialunas podrían ser un poquito mejor, pero no le quita al placer de hacer esa parada en el momento justo sobre la ruta 9

(Translated by Google)
Always clean, delicious coffee with milk and sandwiches. The hot pita bread is highly recommended. The croissants could be a little better, but it doesn't detract from the pleasure of making that stop at just the right moment on Route 9.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMU5XdU1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Solemos parar ahi cuando viajamos a Córdoba. Excelente atención de los playeros y limpieza impecable en los baños.
Recomiendo hacer parada en los viajes al interior.

(Translated by Google)
We usually stop there when we travel to Córdoba. Excellent service from the attendants and impeccably clean restrooms. I recommend stopping there on trips to the interior of the country.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbU15RkNnEAE
